finding: Original Phase 1B VP RPCs authorized via phase42_is_tenant_member(tenant_id), which allows ANY active tenant_members row (including tenant_staff) plus broad profile venue roles. That violated the Owner rule that ordinary tenant members must not assign/clear VPs.
fix: Introduced public.phase42_can_manage_vice_presidents(p_club_id) and wired both club_assign_vice_president and club_clear_vice_president to that helper only.

exactPredicate.sql: phase42_is_platform_super_admin() OR phase42_has_gov_role(p_club_id, array['club_owner','president']) OR (user_has_permission('club.update') AND (tenant_members.role_code='tenant_owner' OR profiles.role IN ('VENUE_OWNER','COURT_OWNER','TENANT_OWNER') for club.tenant_id))
denied: ordinary club members / PLAYER without gov role

blockedReason: SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN and staging QA env credentials are not available in this workspace session
